E6 - Kids Who Kill - Kim Edwards & Lucas Markham
programme.desc: Kim Edwards and Lucas Markham were both outsiders from troubled homes. They felt they understood each other when no one else did. Together they made a plan to get rid of the mum and sister Kim resented.

programme.title: E6 - Kids Who Kill - Kim Edwards & Lucas Markham
programme.desc: Kim Edwards and Lucas Markham were both outsiders from troubled homes. They felt they understood each other when no one else did. Together they made a plan to get rid of the mum and sister Kim resented.

programme.title: E1 - Murder On The Family Farm
programme.desc: A Kentucky community is rocked to its core when a prominent family is gunned down in their home after Sunday church service. The sole survivor of the attack claims he killed an intruder in self-defence.

programme.title: E2 - The Bond Of Brothers
programme.desc: After a woman's body is found in a neighbourhood dumpster, investigators narrow down their suspect list to three people, but will they be able to convince the men to break their brotherly bond?

programme.title: E7 - Scary Wedding
programme.desc: A suspect flees from a high-speed car chase while carrying her infant child. State troopers catch a man with a stolen utility pole strapped to the roof of his car.

programme.title: E7 - The Cost Of Happiness
programme.desc: One FBI undercover agent meets with suspects in Denmark in an effort to retrieve one of the world's lost treasures; another agent takes on an unlikely suspect believed to be planning a murder for hire.

programme.title: E13 - Alexis Murphy
programme.desc: Social media influencer Alexis Murphy was on her way to a hair appointment, but never arrived. When a photo of her abandoned car was posted online, her worried loved-ones knew something was terribly wrong.

programme.title: E531 - Hunted On The Highway
programme.desc: In Mobile, two men are killed after their car is sprayed with bullets on the highway, leading detectives across the country in search of answers.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Renee is on the lookout for a missing croc. The men mess up their top-jaw roping practice and they have a runaway croc on their hands. Lyn tells John her tragic secret.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: Jess heads to Wyatt Ranches in South Texas to check out the cattle ranching operation they've been running since 1965.

programme.title: E5 - Big Stone Fever
programme.desc: The mining operation seems to be gaining momentum with regular finds of small carat diamonds, but the big diamonds are eluding them.

programme.title: E5 - Vision Quest
programme.desc: Sonya suffers from a rare degenerative eye disease and is almost completely blind, but that doesn’t stop her from braving the wild alongside Bear Grylls to rediscover her love for the outdoors. Sonya’s spiritual approach to life enlightens bear, and her sense of adventure inspires all.

programme.title: E5 - Gentlemen Start Your Engines
programme.desc: As Chris and Billy psych up for the big challenge race, Billy’s mechanical issues force a hilarious change in plans. And losing the challenge gives the term “Drag Strip” a whole new meaning.

programme.title: E1 - Terry Down Under
programme.desc: Terry and Larry start off the new season testing one of the most requested films, Quigley Down Under. Terry will see if he can hit a 564-yard shot with a Sharps rifle and then we will attempt the 'Quigley'. An 800-yard shot, trying to kill 2 bad guys with 1 bullet!

programme.title: E2 - Bond, Terry Bond
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be testing the effectiveness of driving a vehicle with fully automatic machine guns mounted to the car! Just like 007 did with his Aston Martin DB5.

programme.title: E6 - Wildfire
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a devastating bushfire season, Zac and Darin learn about efforts to rehabilitate the wildlife and livestock population.

programme.title: E6 - Wildfire
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a devastating bushfire season, Zac and Darin learn about efforts to rehabilitate the wildlife and livestock population.

programme.title: E5 - Gentlemen Start Your Engines
programme.desc: As Chris and Billy psych up for the big challenge race, Billy’s mechanical issues force a hilarious change in plans. And losing the challenge gives the term “Drag Strip” a whole new meaning.

programme.title: E5 - Big Stone Fever
programme.desc: The mining operation seems to be gaining momentum with regular finds of small carat diamonds, but the big diamonds are eluding them.

programme.title: E5 - Vision Quest
programme.desc: Sonya suffers from a rare degenerative eye disease and is almost completely blind, but that doesn’t stop her from braving the wild alongside Bear Grylls to rediscover her love for the outdoors. Sonya’s spiritual approach to life enlightens bear, and her sense of adventure inspires all.

programme.title: E1 - Terry Down Under
programme.desc: Terry and Larry start off the new season testing one of the most requested films, Quigley Down Under. Terry will see if he can hit a 564-yard shot with a Sharps rifle and then we will attempt the 'Quigley'. An 800-yard shot, trying to kill 2 bad guys with 1 bullet!

programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be testing the effectiveness of driving a vehicle with fully automatic machine guns mounted to the car! Just like 007 did with his Aston Martin DB5.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 故事背景設定在不久的將來，在這個世界中，人們過去的性關係通過一條發光的紅色「S線」在他們頭頂上方以視覺方式連接。一位刑警、一位神秘的老師，以及一個天生能看到這些線的少女，共同應對由這一現象引發的系列令人不安的事件。

programme.title: Le Mystere De La Chambre Jaune
programme.desc: Following the attempted murder of Mathilde, daughter of the Professor Strangerson, the young reporter Rouletabille head for chateau du Glandier to clear up the mystery. Who is the murderer? What is his motive? And above all how did he escape from a yellow bedroom which was locked from the inside?

programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: E21 - Kite
programme.desc: Stanley helps Little Woo and Seamus fly their new kite. It gets stuck up a tree and breaks. Using leaves and sticks, they build a better one, only for that to get stuck.

programme.title: E20 - Heavy
programme.desc: Stanley and Morris put too many boxes on the barge and now one end is sinking and the other is lifting up. Stanley get's the townsfolk to help level it out.

programme.title: E31 - It's Time To Be Nature Detectives
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are off to join Cynthia and the Nature Club at the park looking for animals that are hard to spot. JoJo has packed her Nature Tick Book and her magnifying glass. But where is Panda?

programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: E11 - Train
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'train' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see a fast train, a slow train, an animal train and even meet a super train!

programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: E14 - Tiger Bear
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: E7 - Wrong Devil, Wrong Deal

programme.title: Build Resilience: Climate-Conscious Cities, Homes And Coasts
programme.desc: Ancient sand dunes protect Tamil Nadu, urban planners design cities to be a shield against extreme weather. Plus: Building cyclone-resilient, sustainable homes.

programme.title: Help, We've Been Hacked!
programme.desc: Ransomware poses an existential threat to businesses. It's a form of cybercrime that's a highly professional industry. The criminals operate like a business - but infiltrating systems, encrypting data, and extorting money.

programme.title: Polio Remians A Risk In Madagascar
programme.desc: Madagascar struggles to eradicate polio, the failure of the EU's single-use plastic ban, and timeless tradition in a hotel in the Chilean Andes.

programme.title: What Happens When A Town Creates Its Own Currency?
programme.desc: If you join carsharing or buy solar panels, you get paid money in a currency of its own in the small town Traunstein at Lake Chiemsee in Germany. The trick: you can only spend the 'Chiemgauer” in stores and pubs in the region, which again should cut Co2 emissions. Does it work?

programme.title: Premier League 25/26 -Manchester City vs Nottingham Forest
ATP 26 Tiriac Open presented by UniCredit Bank -QF (1)
Bum Noises!
programme.desc: Dr Xand has been recording his farts. But why is it they sound so different? And we meet two of our brilliant new Ouchers!

programme.title: Rock Around The Clock
programme.desc: While admiring the sea life in an ocean rock pool, Darwin & Newts discover that the water level is lowering. They try to stop the leak to save the creatures, but learn that they didn't need to worry.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: Crazy Craters
programme.desc: Eric learns that most asteroids burn out before they reach our planet. But sometimes, when they're super huge, they hit Earth and make really big craters. He does an experiment to show what would happen in that situation.

programme.title: Trip to Tibet
programme.desc: Zoe has started to make a mandala and she needs Milo's beautiful colouring pencils to finish it. That is not a problem for Milo, except that his pencil box is empty! How can Zoe finish her mandala without colouring pencils? A trip to Tibet soon appears to be necessary.

programme.title: Trip to Burkina Faso
programme.desc: In Burkina Faso, our heroes' penfriend Jamal can't wait to introduce Zoe and Milo to his parents, and like Alim, he appears to have several mums and dads. What a mystery!

programme.title: Spy Vision!
programme.desc: Eric wants to be a secret agent. He makes a periscope so he can watch the world without being seen. He discovers that the same principle is used by submarines and even by dentists.

programme.title: Windy Weather Watching
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts build a wind speed-and-direction measuring device to warn when the rain is coming.

programme.title: Electric Current and Power
programme.desc: How do batteries work? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of electricity. Have hands-on fun by making a battery using lemons, and get to know Nikola Tesla, physicist, engineer and inventor, who conceived the modern alternating current supply system.

programme.title: Okefenokee Doki
programme.desc: The mosquitoes are driving Oto crazy, so he and Doki build a ‘bug trapper' device to solve the problem. To Mundi, this is wrong. What good are pesky flies and mosquitoes, anyway? Mundi makes off with the device in the plane, and hides it in Georgia's Okefenokee Swamp!

programme.title: Tides
programme.desc: Lost at sea, Kit and Mr. Battery try to get the compass from the shipwreck, guarded by two surly captains.

programme.title: Trip to Tahiti
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo have a presentation to prepare for school, and they are scratching their heads to find the most original way to do this. Our friends travel to Tahiti, where they meet with Amana and learn more about telling a story through dance.

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part II
programme.desc: Our heroes prepare for a sleepover in the HQ, but it seems impossible to divide the space, so they each have a separate bedroom. Alim knows of places where people feel more comfortable sleeping together in the same room. Everyone is soon in Japan for a new adventure.

programme.title: Hitting a Wall
programme.desc: An 'obstacle course day' in gym class forces the group to reunite and work together. Meanwhile, Kelly has been missing from school, and the gang needs to find her to continue on their mission.

programme.title: Lemon Cookies
programme.desc: While singing, Telmo and Tula prepare some delicious lemon cookies. Once they finish kneading the dough, they will need to fill many cooking molds.

programme.title: Tides
programme.desc: Lost at sea, Kit and Mr. Battery try to get the compass from the shipwreck, guarded by two surly captains.

programme.title: From the Stars
programme.desc: The Nektons try to stop a fallen satellite's fuel from polluting a marine sanctuary. But someone else is also interested in the satellite.

programme.title: Three Versions
programme.desc: Albert appears hanging from the basket with a pineapple. Robbie and Naomi give their versions of what happened to the principal.

programme.title: Ski You Later
programme.desc: Darwin, Newts, Burpee, and Kea set off on a cross country skiing adventure to visit a glacier, and learn some cool science along the way!

programme.title: Spinning Seeds
programme.desc: Eric learns that plants have different ways to make their seeds fly as far away as possible. He makes his own version of the maple seed, which looks like a little paper helicopter.

programme.title: Secret Code
programme.desc: Eric learns that computer coding means writing programmes that tell robots and computers how to do certain jobs. Just as we use language to communicate with other people, there are lots of different programming or 'coding' languages to talk to computers.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Parrot
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Parrot. It turns out that Parrot has been left a secret treasure map by his great grandfather.

programme.title: Frog
programme.desc: Binah and Grandad are fascinated to learn that a group of frogs is called an army and begin to wonder which one might be the general. Flip, Flop, and Flow pretend to be amphibians. And Tiny and Daddy Owl are worried about Mommy, who can't stop coughing.

programme.title: Chasing Unicorns
programme.desc: The team is asked to go and check on some radio-tagged wildlife – unicorns to be precise! Everyone wants to know if unicorns are real. They set off to the Canadian Arctic, using a tracking beacon to find the mysterious creatures.

programme.title: Spinning Seeds
programme.desc: Eric learns that plants have different ways to make their seeds fly as far away as possible. He makes his own version of the maple seed, which looks like a little paper helicopter.

programme.title: This is Where it Starts
programme.desc: It's the Artistic British Championships. Alice is facing strong competition as she is up against Amelie and Phoebe's teammates from the European Championships. Meanwhile, Ekraj is late for podium training and doesn't seem focused on the competition.

programme.title: Stepping Up
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Zoe has to improve her skills to compete at the senior level. Meanwhile, Ekraj has to make a tough decision.

programme.title: Lighting Up the Sky
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts build solar-powered lights to help them feed an injured kiwi in the forest.

programme.desc: Thousands of people swear they've encountered this legendary North American creature, but Bigfoot has never been officially identified. As evidence continues to mount, the mystery endures.

programme.title: E18 - The Legend Of Bigfoot

programme.title: A Boyfriend To Die For
programme.desc: Olivia never wanted to be known as a product of nepotism, but as a rising star in her father's firm, that's exactly how people see her. Determined to prove herself, she meets Jonathan Rothfield.

programme.title: E18 - From Home To Hotspot
programme.desc: Buddy checks out two legendary restaurants that originated as people's actual homes. First, he's going to the Loveless Cafe to taste their southern staples like crispy fried chicken and tender pork chops.

programme.title: E10 - Prank Callers/More Smarter/Stick Hockey/T.G.I. Tuesday/Survival Skills
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby decide to make prank phone calls. They try to prank the Master Prank Caller numerous times, although they fail to fool him (and only make him increasingly annoyed).

programme.title: E21 - B. The Banana/The Phone/The Job/Halloween/The Treasure
programme.desc: Darwin lends his pen to Banana Joe but, when it comes back chewed, Gumball's thoughts turn to revenge.

programme.title: E143 - Sam-Merica/Put The Cat Out - Door Spin/Barbecue Bandit/Happy Birdy To You/Spring Forw
programme.desc: Yosemite Sam tries to start a new country. Sylvester does not want to be put out for the night. Daffy keeps eating all the hamburgers Elmer cooks.

programme.title: E49 - The Message/Political Power
programme.desc: Steven and the Gems try to retrieve a message from the Wailing Stone.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E40
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E40
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

E6
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: E2 - Funny Feelings & Creative Fixes!
programme.desc: It's a day of funny feelings & creative fixes! A worried Dandy brings Fiona to the garage because her lights & sirens aren't working. Gecko discovers no fix is needed because Fiona is just feeling sad inside. Then, when Blue is anxious about school because Bobby doesn't look like the bus in his book, Gecko comes up with a creative plan to let the Mechs paint Bobby! Plus, Gecko finds a creative way to deal with a swarm of bees that have nested in Trevor's engine.

programme.title: E1 - A Fun School Day with JJ & Friends!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his friends for a fun school day at Melon Patch Academy! Ms. Appleberry finds exciting ways to learn, like using building blocks & drawings to practice the alphabet. Then, the kids play a fun guessing game to learn all about the five senses & how to sign them in ASL! The learning continues as they sing about the days of the week, play a fun alphabet photo game on a rainy day & enjoy story time with the whole family. It's a day packed with learning & fun!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Day on the Farm!
programme.desc: Join Ella for a super fun day at Lellobee City Farm! First, when a nest of baby duck eggs starts to hatch, Ella has to play 'Mummy Duck' to keep all the cute but runaway ducklings together! Then, Rishi organizes all the animals for a friendly game of soccer, where everyone learns each other's animal sounds. The fun day ends with a new arrival, as Ella & Mei find & adopt a stray cat named Bingo, welcoming him to his new home!

programme.title: E1 - The Wacky World of Winston & Orphle!
programme.desc: Welcome to the wacky world of Winston & Orphle! First, Winston tricks a Magic Pet into growing his robots of Mila & Morphle big enough to steal the entire Magic Pet Center! Then, Orphle causes trouble on his own when he runs away with the cake Mila made for her & Morphle's Matchiversary. The two troublemakers team up to try & get their hands on a special surprise gift, but it's up to Mila & Morphle to stop them!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Digley, Dazey & the crew for a big day of rescues & learning! When the barn at Old MacDonald's Farm catches fire, the crew uses quick thinking to extinguish the flames. Then, a trip to the mountains goes wrong when an avalanche traps them in a tunnel, & they must find a clever way to escape! The rescues continue as Digley faces his fear of heights to restore a broken clock & the friends work together to save Scout after she falls down a hole during a thunderstorm.

programme.title: E1 - A Fun School Day with JJ & Friends!

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: Power Lunch
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day's agenda. Airing CNBC's award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime

programme.title: E522 - Spider's Web
programme.desc: Ew! There's a spider in the house! Mummy Pig tells Daddy Pig to get rid of it.

programme.title: E607 - Pups Save Gustavo's Guitar
programme.desc: Gustavo Goodway's guitar is missing. The pups need to find it before tonight's campfire concert!

programme.title: E403 - Pups Save The Critters
programme.desc: Francois's trailer unhooked, and all of his critters have gotten loose!

programme.title: E309 - The Crew Builds An Art Museum / The Crew Builds A Giant Alphorn
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the perfect place to show off River's ever-changing photography projects... Builder Cove's own art museum! // Farmer Zoe has a new goat on her farm! But when she can't find the singing goat, the pups team up with Park Ranger Rose.

programme.title: E206 - The Birth / The Revelation
programme.desc: Young Francois witnesses the birth of Barbapapa. // Barbapapa is a prisoner in a zoo.

programme.title: E311 - The Crew Lifts Up City Hall / The Crew Builds A Rotating Restaurant
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: E115 - The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: E201 - Moving Mission / Barbabright's Invention
programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith. // Barbabright has a stroke of genius: the invention of the 'BAM'.

programme.title: E512 - The Mechanic Team!
programme.desc: Blaze stops into Gabby's Garage for a quick repair - just as she gets an alert! Three far-flung trucks need her mechanical know-how! So, Blaze and AJ volunteer to help her take her garage on the go!

programme.title: E108 - Double Booked
programme.desc: Tim tries to be at two parties at once.

programme.title: E126 - Snow
programme.desc: It is snowing, so Peppa and George go outside to play.

programme.title: E127 - Windy Castle
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go to the Windy Castle, and when they get there, they have a wonderful view from the top.

programme.title: E123 - The New Car
programme.desc: The family car breaks down, so Peppa and her family rent a new one, but it starts acting crazy.

programme.title: E305 - The Crew Builds A Giant Skate Track / The Crew Builds A Giant Ice Cream Mak
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew help River take lots of pictures for the big photo contest by building a super-fast way to get around Bulider Cove. // Rubble and the pups help Cafe Carl make enough ice cream for everyone! If Speed Meister doesn't get in the way...

programme.title: E208 - The Crew Builds A Smoothie Shop / The Crew Builds A Dino Roof Party
programme.desc: Cafe Carl opens up a smoothie shop on the boardwalk! But when the coaster causes coconut chaos, Rubble & Crew know just what to do. // Rubble & Crew work together to find a construction solution when Charger's bouncy birthday surprise needs a lift!

programme.desc: Young Francois witnesses the birth of Barbapapa. // Barbapapa is a prisoner in a zoo.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: Darwaza Bandh Rakho
programme.desc: Four men form a gang planning a quick ransom from a rich girl, but the scheme backfires, testing loyalties and forcing unexpected, life changing choices. Release Year: 2006 Director: J. D. Chakravarthi

programme.title: Atithi Tum Kab Jaoge
programme.desc: A tired working couple hosts an uninvited guest who refuses to depart, suddenly turning their routine evening into a tense, humorous test of hospitality and boundaries. Release Year: 2010 Director: Ashwni Dhir Awards: 2011 Winner Apsara Award- Best Comic Actor- Paresh Rawal, 2011 Winner Bollywood BusineSS Award- Most Profitable Actor- Ajay Devgn

programme.title: Omg - Oh My God!
programme.desc: Kanji is an atheist whose life takes an ugly turn when an earthquake destroys his antique shop. He does not give up hope and decides to sue God. Release Year: 2012 Director: Umesh Shukla Awards: 2013 WinnerSilver Lotus Award- Best Screenplay Adapted- Bhavesh Mandalia, Umesh Shukla, 2013 Winner Reader's Choice- Star of the Year- Actor- Akshay Kumar

programme.title: The Adventurers
programme.desc: 20 years ago, in the region of Golden Triangle, Wah(aged about 9) and his parents, his god father (Keung) with his daughter (aged about 5) planned to smuggle some valuable items and information into Thailand. Wah's father, Keung and Leung were the closest of friends, just like blood brothers, all 3 of them were C.I.A. agents. Keung left for Thailand before the others to plan the operation. Leung ganged up with some bandits and forced Wah's father to surrender the confidential information. Wah, hidden in the dark, saw his parents being killed. 20 years later, Wah became an officer in the Thai Air Force. He couldn't take his mind off the revenge. Leung became a successful business man. He was in Thailand to launch a major business project. Ignoring Keung's advise, Wah and Roy slipped into Leung's hotel to try to assassinate him...

programme.title: Point Of No Return
programme.desc: After police detective Lau is ambushed and killed, his best friend Pitt vows to get the killer. A series of investigation follows. Pitt finally finds an eyewitness to the killing - Fat Goose who is persuaded to testify against the killer Lam Man Fu. Lam Man Fu chases and attacks Pitt and Fat Goose. Finally, Pitt arrests him but Superintendent Keung frees Lam Man Fu and removes Pitt from the case. Then Lam Man Fu firebombs Fat Goose's residence. Fat Goose moves into Pitt's home and strikes a fast friendship with Angel, Pitt's reporter sister...

programme.title: Point Of No Return
programme.desc: After police detective Lau is ambushed and killed, his best friend Pitt vows to get the killer. A series of investigation follows. Pitt finally finds an eyewitness to the killing - Fat Goose who is persuaded to testify against the killer Lam Man Fu. Lam Man Fu chases and attacks Pitt and Fat Goose. Finally, Pitt arrests him but Superintendent Keung frees Lam Man Fu and removes Pitt from the case. Then Lam Man Fu firebombs Fat Goose's residence. Fat Goose moves into Pitt's home and strikes a fast friendship with Angel, Pitt's reporter sister...

programme.desc: The host provides an in-depth analysis of some of the most shocking real-life crime stories in India and sheds light on how the victims fought back for justice.

programme.title: E4 - Mountains
programme.desc: Climb into a realm of thin air and towering rock. Tag along as mythical monkeys battle for a winter food stash, sing along with lemurs in a fruit-filled tree canopy, and watch an aromatic tree bring together blossom and possum in a moonlit tryst.

programme.title: E6 - To the Rescue
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends, including “ranch manager” Barclay, a Great Dane who happens to be a gifted horse whisperer. In Africa, a tiny marmoset called Thor has become obsessed with two young rescued mongooses.

programme.title: Wolf Children
programme.desc: Hana falls in love with a 'wolf man' and gives birth to two babies. One day, wolf man passed away. Hana takes her children and move away from the crowded city to a small town...

programme.title: Baogu Produces -The Making of Ne Zha 2's Cantonese Dubbing
programme.desc: Now Baogu Movies brings you the Cantonese dubbed version of “Ne Zha 2”, the highest-grossing film of 2025 globally! In this episode, three celebrity actors - Fish Liew Chi Yu, Jennifer Yu, and Peter Chan Charm Man, are invited to unveil their voiceover creation process of this version. Fish surprised audiences with her captivating voice portrayals of the Loong Queen of Western Sea Ao Run and Crana. Jennifer's portrayal of Lady Yin was sincere and moving, even the dubbing director praised it for being touching. Peter's voice-over as the Immortal Wuliang featured numerous roaring scenes, making it a highly challenging experience to him. Let's find out more about their fascinating voiceover stories behind!

Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Fast Talk With Boy Abunda
programme.desc: The latest multi-platform showbiz news and talk show on Kapuso network.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. programme.title: E10 - A Second-Generation Garden
programme.desc: In the village of Windisch, lying in the canton of Argovie and famous for its gardens, Susanne Looser's mother had created an English cottage garden. On her death, Susanne took over and, whilst adapting it to embrace her own personality, she continues to keep her mother's garden very much alive.

programme.title: E10 - Esteban Salazar
programme.desc: Chef Esteban Salazar, originally from Colombia, draws inspiration from his home country and numerous travels. On today's menu: red tuna crusted with cocoa nibs, served with white rice cooked in coconut milk.

programme.title: E13 - Spring Skiing
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas enjoy spring skiing at Mines Madeleine. They take part in an end-of-season ritual that brings together the most passionate and daring skiers.

programme.title: E1 - Frozen In Time
programme.desc: Audre?e lives in an 18th-century country house that has remained intact. On Nuns' Island, the service station designed by Ludwig Mies van der Rohe is a jewel of modern architecture. And gold leaves hold no secrets for Marie-France Kech

programme.title: E13 - Sandra Benhamou/Pelagia Kolotouros/Marie-Cecile Kfouri
programme.desc: In the heart of Brittany, visit the Pont-Aven museum. Interior design and a passion for cinema come together in Sandra Benhamou's world. Lacoste reinvents itself under the leadership of Pelagia Kolotouros. Patient and meticulous, restorer Marie-Cecile Kfouri brings frescoes and old canvases back to life.

programme.title: E2 - Designing The Final Act (Eng Subs)
programme.desc: Why rehearse your death? Inside the mock coffins and drone burials redesigning our final act. FOR YOUTUBE: From living funerals in Taiwan to well-dying' coffin practice in South Korea - and even drone burials - these innovators are helping people face death to reclaim life.

programme.title: Singapore Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programme.title: E1 - The Digital Afterlife (Eng Subs)
programme.desc: Can AI cure grief? Inside the new techs using avatars to digitally resurrect the dead. FOR YOUTUBE: Across Japan, Taiwan and South Korea, families are using AI avatars, holograms and VR to say goodbye - or even keep the conversation going. Is this technology healing grief or prolonging it?

programme.title: Singapore Tonight
programme.desc: From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programme.title: E2 - Designing The Final Act (Eng Subs)
programme.desc: Why rehearse your death? Inside the mock coffins and drone burials redesigning our final act. FOR YOUTUBE: From living funerals in Taiwan to well-dying' coffin practice in South Korea - and even drone burials - these innovators are helping people face death to reclaim life.
